name: Toll Brothers, Inc.
summary: PART I Toll Brothers, Inc., a corporation incorporated in Delaware in May1986, began doing business through predecessor entities in 1967. When this report uses the words we, us, our, and the Company, it refers to Toll Brothers, Inc. and its subsidiaries, unless the context otherwise requires. References herein to fiscal year refer to our fiscal years ended or ending October 31.
